## EventPublisherOptions\.GetDeadLetterTopic\(AggregateIdentity\) Method

Gets the dead\-letter topic name for a specific aggregate identity\.
Format: \{DeadLetterTopicPrefix\}\.\{tenantId\}\.\{domain\}\.events
